prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约12069→13491→11528→13656→15420名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年（2023→2025）累计后移约3892名，2025年基准位次约15420名，为近5年最高（最难进）；该校在云南理科（物理类）招生计划逐年递增：2021年34人、2022年34人、2023年40人、2024年51人、2025年68人；2026年计划66人，较2025年减少2人，为近年首次小幅缩招，对竞争略有缓解但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在100–110名区间（2026年约第107名），属中上游211，在京津冀地区工科院校中认可度较高；该校未出现在近年学校声誉事件统计中，无明显正面或负面舆情；抖音学校热度综合排名第93位，评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量处于211院校中等偏下水平，报考关注度相对平稳；未见明显投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估中该校无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科主要集中在电气工程（B+）、机械工程（B+）、材料科学与工程（B+）、化学工程与技术（B+）等工科领域，与招生专业中的机械类、自动化、新能源、材料类等高度对应，学科实力在211院校中处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业涵盖计算机类、自动化、通信工程、电气类等当前社会高热专业（电子信息/通信2026年评估为“高热推荐”，电气工程及其自动化“高热推荐”），对考生吸引力较强；云南省2026年高考总人数约377900人，按近年物理类占比约60.65%估算，物理类考生约229200人，较2025年（173282人）增加约55900人（+32.3%），竞争显著加剧；河北工业大学主校区位于天津市，在云南省属跨省招生，无本地生源倾斜；该校在云南招生计划近年持续增加（34→68人），2026年小幅回调至66人，整体招生规模仍处高位，对云南考生保持较高开放度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年本省物理类考生大幅增加（约+32.3%）带来的竞争加剧、招生计划小幅缩招（-2人）的微弱缓解效应，以及学校声誉平稳、专业热度偏高等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准15420名基础上继续小幅后移，但受缩招制约后移幅度有限。预测最低位次约15348名，波动区间14848–15848名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14848–15848名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如14800名以内）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、自动化等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如15800名左右）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。该校所有专业均要求首选物理、再选化学，选科不符的考生无法报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 12069 → 13491 → 11528 → 13656 → 15420, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In the past 3 years (2023→2025), the cumulative backward shift is about 3892 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 15420, the highest in the past 5 years (most difficult to enter). The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan for science (physics category) has increased year by year: 34 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 51 in 2024, 68 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 66, a decrease of 2 from 2025, the first slight reduction in recent years, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 100–110 range in recent years (about 107th in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with relatively high recognition in the engineering field in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region. The university has not appeared in recent reputation incident statistics, with no significant positive or negative public opinion; its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a lower-middle level among 211 universities, and application attention relatively stable; no obvious admission gaps or abnormal records have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly in electrical engineering (B+), mechanical engineering (B+), materials science and engineering (B+), chemical engineering and technology (B+), and other engineering fields, which highly correspond to the enrollment majors such as mechanical, automation, new energy, and materials, with discipline strength at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors include computer science, automation, communication engineering, electrical engineering, and other currently socially hot majors (electronic information/communication rated as 'highly recommended' in 2026, electrical engineering and automation 'highly recommended'), which strongly attract candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan Gaokao is about 377,900, with physics category candidates estimated at about 229,200 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 60.65%, an increase of about 55,900 (+32.3%) compared to 2025 (173,282), significantly intensifying competition. Hebei University of Technology's main campus is located in Tianjin, and it recruits across provinces in Yunnan, with no local student preference. The university's enrollment plan in Yunnan has been increasing in recent years (34→68), with a slight reduction to 66 in 2026, but the overall enrollment scale remains high, maintaining a relatively high openness to Yunnan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in physics category candidates in the province in 2026 (about +32.3%) leading to intensified competition, the slight reduction in enrollment plan (-2 people) providing a weak mitigating effect, and factors such as stable university reputation and high major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 15420, but the extent of the backward shift will be limited due to the enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking is about 15348, with a fluctuation range of 14848–15848.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14848–15848, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 14800), focus on applying for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 15800), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. All majors at this university require first choice of Physics and second choice of Chemistry; candidates with mismatched subject selections cannot apply.
